title: Severe Potholes on Main MG Road
description: A series of large potholes have formed near the main junction. During rains, they fill with water, making it extremely dangerous for two-wheelers. Several minor accidents have already occurred this week.
location: MG Road, near Central Metro Station, Bangalore

timeline.note: Assigned to the Ward 84 Engineering Department.

ai_verification.draft_letter:
To,
The Executive Engineer,
Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike,
Bengaluru.

Subject: Urgent repair of potholes on MG Road

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to draw your attention to the hazardous potholes on MG Road. This issue poses an immediate risk to commuter safety and requires urgent asphalt sealing.

Sincerely,
Citizen Ramesh Kumar

title: Overflowing Public Garbage Dumpster
description: The municipal dustbins at the corner of 5th Cross have not been cleared for three days. Stray dogs are scattering waste across the road, creating an unbearable stench and health hazard.

timeline.note: Forwarded to the Solid Waste Management division.

ai_verification.draft_letter:
To,
The Health Inspector,
Solid Waste Management,
Bengaluru.

Subject: Clearing of overflowing dumpster at 5th Cross, Indiranagar

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to report that garbage has accumulated at 5th Cross. It is causing health risks. Kindly dispatch the sanitation truck immediately.

Sincerely,
Citizen Ananya Sharma

title: Broken Streetlight Near Public Park
description: The streetlight directly opposite the main gate of the Sector 4 Public Park has been non-functional for over two weeks. The street is completely dark after 7 PM, creating safety concerns for women and children visiting the park.

timeline.note: Assigned to the Electrical Maintenance division.
Technician dispatched to replace the LED fixture.
Bulb replaced and light verified functional by technician.

ai_verification.draft_letter:
To,
The Senior Engineer,
Noida Power Corporation Ltd,
Noida.

Subject: Replacement of streetlight at Sector 4 Park

Dear Sir/Madam,

The streetlight at Sector 4 Park gate is broken, causing security hazards. Please install a new fixture.

Sincerely,
Citizen Vikram Singh
